text: We'll place the staple line under sterile water and have our anesthesiologist gradually reinflate the lung.

Then we'll use the Pro-Gel in either a spray or stream mode and sometimes both by holding the tip of the applicator approximately two inches away from the lung tissue and moving it back and forth along the staple line as well as on either side of the staple line.
After we've applied the Pro-Gel and we've waited two minutes, we will then repeat the submersion test, again at increasing pressures to ensure that we have a good pleural seal.
